name: herder
description: Create plans from user intent or repository evidence, clarify decisions, and execute them with reviewed multi-agent integration.

interface.shortDescription: Clarify, create, and execute plans with specialized agents.
interface.longDescription: Herder grills requested changes into canonical plans, audits repositories for evidence-backed improvements, maintains a local dependency-aware backlog, reviews candidates, rescues failures, and integrates verified work transactionally.
defaultPrompt: Grill me one decision at a time, then create one validated Herder plan for this change.
Audit this repository and create prioritized Herder plans.
Fire the implementation plans in this repository.
